-Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2main.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_mixer/2.8.1_1/lib/libSDL2_mixer.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libminiupnpc.dylib -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework CoreFoundation /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
